sources.api_notes: Paid Systems Integration Agreement (SIA) required. Contact: developersupport@dat.com
sources.notes: Largest load board in USA. Carrier directory exposes name, phone, DOT. API is the only legal access path.

sources.api_notes: REST API with OAuth2 and Resource Owner Password auth. Developer portal at developer.truckstop.com. SIA required.
sources.notes: Contact data visible only to authenticated platform members. 80M+ loads/year. API partnership required for legal access.

sources.api_notes: No public API. Forum-based community platform.
sources.notes: 1M+ monthly users, 210K+ registered members. Largest trucker online community. Contact info is member-controlled and not publicly listed. Job board section exists but contact exposure is limited.

sources.api_notes: Supports Tenstreet, DriverReach, Ramsey Media Works integrations. No public scraping API.
sources.notes: Specialized CDL job board. Employer contact varies by posting. Dynamic JS rendering. No explicit scraping ban in public ToS but access is restricted in practice.

sources.api_notes: Indeed Hire API exists for employers only. No public data API. ToS explicitly forbids automated access.
sources.notes: 204K+ active truck driver jobs. Cloudflare anti-bot protection. Direct contact info not exposed. Legal risk under CFAA if scraped without permission.

sources.api_notes: Talent Solutions Partner API only. Requires LinkedIn partnership. robots.txt: Disallow: /
sources.notes: Personal contact info NOT exposed publicly. LinkedIn has successfully sued scrapers (CFAA). Account ban and legal risk for unauthorized scraping.

sources.api_notes: No public API. ToS explicitly forbids scraping, crawling, or spidering.
sources.notes: Privacy-focused platform. Explicitly states 'no data-sharing or email dumping'. Express written consent required for any automated access. Not recommended.

sources.api_notes: SONAR platform and Carrier Details database are paid services, not job data APIs.
sources.notes: NOT a job board. Industry news and market data company. Carrier Details aggregates FMCSA federal data. Not suitable for driver contact collection.

sources.api_notes: Broker API, Users API, Application API. Acquired by DAT from Flexport (2024). Contact: partnerships@convoy.com
sources.notes: Now integrated into DAT platform post-acquisition. Requires authentication. API partnership required for programmatic access.

recommended_sources.reason: Largest load board in USA with 644K+ daily listings. Carrier directory exposes name, phone, DOT number. Official API available via paid SIA agreement.
recommended_sources.action: Apply for Systems Integration Agreement at dat.com/resources/api-integration. Contact: developersupport@dat.com

recommended_sources.reason: 350K+ daily loads, 80M+ loads/year. REST API with OAuth2. Carrier profiles include phone and contact info for authenticated users.
Largest trucker online community (1M+ monthly users). Medium difficulty to monitor. Job board section has employer and driver postings.
recommended_sources.action: Monitor job board section manually or with rate-limited scraping. No API available. Respect member privacy.

recommended_sources.reason: Specialized CDL job board with national coverage. Medium difficulty. Integrates with ATS platforms like Tenstreet.
recommended_sources.action: Explore Tenstreet or DriverReach integration partnerships for data access.

data_freshness_strategy.how_to_get_new_listings_daily: Use DAT or Truckstop API with date filter on createdAt field. For web sources, compare hash of listing page content to detect changes.
data_freshness_strategy.deduplication: Use composite key of (platform + job_id) or (company_name + location + posted_date) as unique identifier. Store in database with upsert logic.
data_freshness_strategy.quality_filtering: Filter out listings missing phone or email. Prefer postings with rate/salary info. Prioritize owner-operator vs company driver listings.

implementation_notes: All major platforms prohibit scraping in their Terms of Service. The only legally compliant path at scale is through official API partnerships (DAT, Truckstop). For small-scale manual research, TruckersReport and CDLjobs.com are accessible. Recommended tech stack: Python with httpx + BeautifulSoup for exploratory scraping, or official SDK/REST clients for API integrations. Use rotating proxies and rate limiting if doing research scraping. Always check robots.txt before automated access. For production use, budget $500-2000/month for DAT or Truckstop API access tiers.
